rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks within the appropriate AADL component scope
Use assume/guarantee syntax for component type contracts and assign for implementation-level bindings
generic_rules: Generate syntactically valid AGREE annex blocks using proper logical operators and type declarations
Ensure all visible AADL features and constants are properly referenced in AGREE expressions
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
Avoid encoding AADL property names directly as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Component type contracts use assume/guarantee; implementation contracts use assign for outputs
Use eq for helper declarations and const for constants with proper scalar types (int, real, bool)
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Period or Deadline directly in AGREE expressions without model exposure
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use assign for output bindings only
irrelevant_topics: Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
